PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
TENTATIVE RULING: Off calendar; dismissal entered 05/18/2026.
EXAMINER: AERO FETH

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Appraisal
TENTATIVE RULING: Off calendar
EXAMINER: AERO FETH

Petition To Confirm Proposed Action [Probate Code 16500 Et Seq. And 17200(B)(6)]
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frank Cialone for trustee Martin Gaehwiler, who was also present.
Batya Forsyth for beneficiary M. Catherine Gaehwiler (via Zoom).
Eric McIntosh for Kathleen Gaehwiler (via Zoom).
MaryJo Lopez-Oneal for Brigitte L. Gaehwiler (via Zoom).

The matters were called for hearing on: 1) Petition to Confirm Proposed Action; 2) Amended Petition for Instructions; 3) Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement; and 4) Status of Appraisal.

The Court stated it had reviewed the filings and was prepared to sign the order approving the settlement agreement. The Court noted that approval of the settlement would resolve the Petition to Confirm Proposed Action.

Counsel requested a continuance of the Amended Petition for Instructions and the Status of Appraisal, indicating the parties were close to resolution. The Court continued those matters to June 16, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

The Court signed the order approving the settlement agreement in open court. The Petition to Confirm Proposed Action was taken off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Continued To Mar-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frank Cialone for trustee Martin Gaehwiler, Jr., who was also present.
Batya Forsyth and Kathleen Aberegg for beneficiary M. Catherine Gaehwiler.
Eric McIntosh for Kathleen Gaehwiler.
Elizabeth Dorsi for Bridgette Gaehwiler.
Mia Gaehwiler, interested party.
Kristine Foster, interested party.

The matter was called for hearing on 1) Petition to Confirm Proposed Action; 2) Amended Petition for Instructions; 3) Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement; and 4) Status of Appraisal.

The Court recused itself from the matter due to a conflict of interest and therefore did not reach the merits of the petitions.

With no objections raised, the Court continued the matter to March 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to be heard by another judicial officer.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Amber Abreu-Piexoto, CSR #13546, aemerickcsr@gmail.com, 510-677-4324. (D204)

Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Continued To Jan-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Proposed Action [Probate Code 16500 Et Seq. And 17200(B)(6)]
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Continued To Jan-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Frank Cialone appeared for and with Martin Gaehwiler (petitioner).
Kathleen Aberegg appeared via zoom for Catherine Gawhwiler (objector).
Elizabeth Dorsi appeared via zoom.

Discussion was held regarding mediation, that there are very close to a conclusion upon approving a settlement agreement, that they are still in the process of selecting an appraiser, that there are 3 potential appraisers, and that Ms. Aberegg will send an e-mail to Mr. Cialone with the 3 potential appraisers to select from if no conflict is discovered.

Status of Appraisal is set for Janaury 28, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Petition for approval of settlement. The Court authorizes a hearing date of Janaury 28, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Approved by Judge Moody.

All matters are continued to Janaury 28, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Continued To Nov-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Montgomery appeared by telephone for Martin Gaehwiler, Jr. (Petitioner).

Mr. Montgomery stated that he had several exchanges with the Probate Examiner, that he believes they resolved all of the issues and that he is not sure what issues are remaining. The Court stated that the language in the 8th amendment to the trust conflicts with the Trustor's intent to transfer the bank accounts to the trust, and that the bank accounts were transferred to the name of the Trustee and not to the trust as intended. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-21-2020 Continued To Aug-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-24-2020 Continued To Apr-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-03-2020 Continued To Mar-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
George Montgomery, II for Martin Gaehwiler, Jr., Petitioner.

The Court noted that it would have liked to see the prior trust instrument, and even more interested in regard to the notice to the children without knowing about custody arrangements. Mr. Montgomery stated that he couldn't understand the Probate Examiner's notes, wasn't sure if additional notice was required if two parents are married and live together, and that the court rules state "a" parent get notice not specific as to which parent, if one of the parents is the petitioner. The Court stated that it wants to know who has custody of kids at the address being served. Mr. Montgomery stated he will furnish a declaration and notice, and submits a revised proposed order per Probate Examiner's notes about account numbers.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to March 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, filings by March 17, 2020.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
